runtime_expectations: prove_foundation.py would emit one local SIM_EVIDENCE v1 block for S_FOUNDATION_PROOF if non_commutative, is_mixed, and trace_preserved all evaluate true.
The source constructs Pauli X and Z, a Bell state, a partial trace over qubit B, and a depolarizing probe with p = 0.1.
Source-based analytic consequences are: non_commutative true, reduced-state purity 0.4999999999999998, entanglement_generates_entropy true, and trace_preserved true.
